title: senecio tortuosus
intro: Senecio tortuosus, also known as the Twisted Groundsel, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio tortuosus include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease coughs, and relieve congestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy for respiratory conditions. Senecio tortuosus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
